games.title: Neon Breach
games.summary: A browser-native arena FPS prototype with wave scoring, jump combat, and distinct skitter/brute/warden enemy classes for testing agent-built gameplay loops, visual clarity, and browser smoke automation.
manualChecklist: Start the game and confirm pointer lock instructions are clear.
Use W/A/S/D and verify movement feels correct, not reversed.
Aim with mouse and fire with left click or F fallback.
Confirm drones spawn, move toward the player, and can be destroyed.
Confirm HUD score, wave, health, and heat values update.
Let enemies hit you and confirm restart flow works when health reaches zero.
nextIdeas: Add arena landmarks, quadrant signage, cover, and boundary readability.
Record automated 10-second gameplay videos in CI.

games.title: Void Garden
games.summary: A cursor-haunted greenhouse toy where spores orbit, a moon-mouth blinks, and the specimen log mutates when you feed the void.
manualChecklist: Open the greenhouse and confirm the overlay disappears.
Move the cursor and confirm the sigil tracks pointer position.
Press F and confirm petals/specimens/weirdness increase.
Press Space and confirm the whisper text changes.
Watch spores drift toward the cursor without frame drops.
Confirm the specimen log remains readable over the animated canvas.
nextIdeas: Add timed rituals with scoring and failure states.
Let specimens combine into named monstrosities.
Add generated synth chirps for feeding and moon blinks.
